query: SELECT arquivo_id, COUNT(*) as total_itens, SUM(CAST(valor_pago AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_pago, SUM(CAST(valor_glosa AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_glosa, SUM(CAST(valor_informado AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_informado FROM demonstrativo WHERE arquivo_id IN (1020280, 1020281, 1020282, 1020283, 1020284, 1020285) GROUP BY arquivo_id ORDER BY arquivo_id
